must_detect.matched_text: Lawful bases: consent for marketing, contract for payroll/benefits, legal obligation for taxes, legitimate interests for fraud monitoring; no automated decisions with legal effects.
This notice does not create securities disclosure rights; draft earnings, guidance, and internal forecasts are classified MNPI and not provided to data subjects.

Sample onboarding record: Mr. Ramon J. Villoria — payroll at IslaBank San Isidro Branch, Peso Account No. 0132-445667-9; contact +63 905 444 2211.
Investor relations and underwriting support logs store subscriber email ir@lakanpacific.ph and meeting times; we avoid including MNPI in call notes.
Transfers: payroll and investor payment files sent to IslaBank under a data sharing agreement; audit copies retained per tax authority requirements; URL https://privacy.lakanpacific.ph/access?req=DSAR-2026-00084&tin=456789123000.
Retention: HR 10 years from separation; tax vouchers 10 years; capital-markets working papers until audit close; chat transcripts 90 days; we do not store device mac addresses.
Regulatory disclosures under the Securities Regulation Code are made when required, but material non-public information is ring‑fenced and excluded from DSAR responses.
Invalid/bait identifiers not treated as subject data: Public Helpline 1155 (general hotline), Sample Social ID 00-0000000-0 (example only, invalid).
Role-only contacts (HR Officer, Treasury Analyst, Compliance Lead) on forms are placeholders and do not identify specific people.
To submit a request, provide your request code and at least one direct identifier: e.g., DSAR-26-0007 and T I N 4 5 6 7 8 9 1 2 3 0 0 0; do not send photos of keys or pets.
Lawful bases: consent for marketing, contract for payroll/benefits, legal obligation for taxes, legitimate interests for fraud monitoring; no automated decisions with legal effects.
